GB 38450一2019
4.4 Lumen maintenance
The Ilumen maintenance factor at 3 000 h of LED flat panel luminaires shall not be less than the re-
quired value of Iumen maintenance factor related to rated lifetime.， The required value of Ilumen
maintenance factor shall be calculated by Formula (1).
ao

LM =(70%) “                                                          (1)
where

LM isthe Ilumen maintenance factor;

加     is the rated lifetime,， expressed in hour (h).
5 Test methods
5.1 Luminous efficacy，correlated colortemperature and color rendering index
Luminous efficacy，correlated color temperature and color rendering index of LED flat panel lumi-
naires shall be tested in accordance with test methods specified in GB/T 31897. 201.
5.2 Lumen maintenance
The applicable test methods for Ilumen maintenance are determined based on whether LED flat
panel luminaires adoptLED packages with LM-80 test reports.
Whenthe LED flat panelluminaire adopts the LED packages with LM-80 test reports and the corre-
sponding parameters listed in the reports are verified compliance by testing and calculation ，then
3 000 hlumen maintenance factor in the LM-80 test reports can be accepted as the Ilumen mainte-
nance factor at 3 000 h for the LED flat panel luminaire. When LED package's tested values are
verified to be non-compliant，or LM-80 test reports of the LED packages are not available， lumen
maintenance shall be tested in accordance with the test methods specified in GB/T 31897. 201.

3
